security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:4318 http://127.0.0.1:4318 ws://localhost:4318 ws://127.0.0.1:4318; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Consent-based agent observability and memory orchestration.
bundle.longDescription: Theia Control Center provides transparent, permission-based agent workflow observability, memory visibility, and risk alerts for local and enterprise setups.
